{{Quote|The Lady deals with all assortment of items. Anything from a CDEF to an imperial T-21.|[[Sneg]], about [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]|<ref name="SWG:StH">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=conversation|Sneg the Hand|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
The '''CDEF blaster pistol''' was a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] produced by [[Corellian Arms/Legends|Corellian Arms]].<ref name="Sun" />

==Description==
[[File:CDEF_blaster.jpg|200px|thumb|left|A CorSec officer using a CDEF pistol]]
The CDEF blaster was a basic, cheap, and mass-produced design pistol manufactured by [[Corellian Arms/Legends|Corellian Arms]].<ref name="Sun" /> CDEF pistols lacked power and precision and were often of poor quality.<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=CorSec CDEF Pistol}}</ref> Although the weapon lacked the stopping power of comparable [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], the weapon's relatively small size, reliability, and ease of maintenance made it an appreciated sidearm.<ref name="Sun" />

==History==
The CDEF blaster pistol was the standard sidearm issued to CorSec officers and had been kept it in service with the [[Corellian Security Force]] since before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Sun" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], CorSec personnel were also known to use variations of in the CDEF line, particularly a [[CDEF carbine|carbine]] and [[CDEF rifle|rifle]].<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

The [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] known as [[Tendau Nandon]] was known to carry one, although he was never comfortable with brandishing a weapon. However, he heroically used his CDEF pistol to kill a [[Tusk cat]] that had attacked his friend, [[Dusque Mistflier]].<ref name="TRoD">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' and accompanying source material, this weapon was simply identified as a CDEF pistol,<ref name="SWG" /> but was given the full name of CDEF blaster pistol in ''[[Suns of Fortune]]''.<ref name="Sun" />
